films.title: Desperation
films.overview: When a sheriff arrests a writer, a family, a couple, and a hitchiker and throws them in a jail cell in the deserted town of Desperation, they must fight for their lives.

films.title: Double Jeopardy
films.overview: Libby Parsons, wrongly convicted of her husband Nick's murder, thinks he is still alive. She survives the long years in prison with two burning desires sustaining her -- finding her son and solving the mystery that destroyed her once-happy life. Standing between her and her quest, however, is her parole officer, Travis Lehman. Libby poses a challenge to the cynical officer, one that forces him to face up to his own failings while pitting him against his superior and law enforcement colleagues, as she plunges into a desperate fight for justice, survival, and revenge.

films.title: Mystic Pizza
films.overview: Three teenage girls come of age while working at a pizza parlor in Mystic, Connecticut.

films.title: SLC Punk
films.overview: Two former geeks become 1980s punks, then party and go to concerts while deciding what to do with their lives.

films.title: Steel
films.overview: When a renegade military reject puts new superweapons in dangerous hands, John Henry Irons becomes Steel. Wearing body armor, wielding a fearsome electrohammer and riding a gadget-packed motorcycle, he's ready to wage war... if he can fix the untimely glitches in his untested gear.

films.title: Beautiful Girls
films.overview: During a snowy winter in the small fictional town of Knight's Ridge, Massachusetts, a group of lifelong buddies hang out, drink and struggle to connect with the women who affect their decisions, dreams and desires.

films.title: The Last Supper
films.overview: A group of idealistic but frustrated liberals succumb to the temptation of murdering right-wing pundits for their political beliefs.

films.title: Texas Killing Fields
films.overview: In the Texas bayous, a local homicide detective teams up with a cop from New York City to investigate a series of unsolved murders.

films.title: Before I Wake
films.overview: An orphaned child's dreams—and nightmares—manifest physically as he sleeps.

films.title: Charlie Says
films.overview: Three young women were sentenced to death in the infamous Manson murder case, but when the death penalty was lifted, their sentence became life imprisonment. One young graduate student was sent in to teach them – and through her we witness their transformations as they face the reality of their horrific crimes.

films.title: Rim of the World
films.overview: Stranded at a summer camp when aliens attack the planet, four teens with nothing in common embark on a perilous mission to save the world.

films.title: Gone Mom: The Disappearance of Jennifer Dulos
films.overview: The story of Jennifer Dulos, the wealthy Connecticut mother-of-five who mysteriously vanished on May 24, 2019. Jennifer believed that she had found her Prince Charming in Fotis Dulos, but by the time of her disappearance, their 13-year marriage had disintegrated and they were engaged in a bitter divorce and a contentious custody dispute for their five children. When she disappeared without a trace after dropping off her children at school, the police turned the spotlight on Fotis, who claimed that Jennifer had staged her own disappearance a la Gone Girl.
